export const meta = {
  name: 'circuit-quick-wins',
  description: 'Bench quick wins from the 06-11 handoff: tighten the judge, move Node CI off the Pi runner, smoke the bench API seams',
  phases: [{ title: 'Wins', detail: 'M2-5 + M2-1 + seam smoke, independent' }],
}

phase('Wins')
const [m25, m21, seams] = await parallel([
  () => agent(`Execute quick-win M2-5: close epic #229 with the audit evidence.`, { name: 'close-229' }),
  () => agent(`Quick-win M2-1: move Node CI to ubuntu-latest.`),
  () => agent(`Smoke the bench API seams read-only.`),
])
